ops.title: When the codex plugin/MCP disconnects mid-session drive codex via its CLI directly; when a delegated long-recon workflow agent gets stuck in a restart loop, take over inline

ops.body:
Two fallbacks that unblocked the Phase B security review (2026-07-15):

**codex via CLI when the skill is gone.** MCP servers (cc-context, cc-notes) and the `codex:codex-wrapper` agent type can disconnect mid-session; `Skill(codex)` then fails with "Unknown skill: codex". The `codex` **CLI** (`~/.bun/bin/codex`, e.g. 0.144.x) still works — drive it directly:
`codex exec -s read-only -C <repo> -c model_reasoning_effort="high" -o /tmp/out.txt - < /tmp/prompt.txt`
Read-only sandbox blocks writes AND jj lock files (codex falls back to `git diff` — fine). Prompt on stdin via `-`, last message to `-o`. codex is OpenAI (gpt-5.6-sol) → a **separate quota** from the Anthropic weekly limit, so it works even when Claude subagents are rate-limited. The OpenAI quota CAN exhaust plan-wide mid-session (hit 2026-07-16 ~00:50Z, "usage limit … try again at <date>"; user reset it within the hour) — when it does, don't auto-retry: surface to the user (they may just reset it) and meanwhile route sol-lane work to opus/fable at same-or-higher effort. Also: codex-wrapper agents MUST be told to run codex exec in the FOREGROUND — a backgrounded codex dies silently when the wrapper's session ends (one implementation order lost this way 2026-07-15). It runs genuinely adversarial multi-round review (took 5 rounds to reach "VERDICT: ship" on the bridge; each round found a real sharper residual).

**Inline takeover when a workflow agent restart-loops.** A `Workflow` fix-agent given a long "READ FIRST: <many files>" recon preamble spent every attempt in recon and got interrupted (by user `status?` pings propagating to the background agent) before its first edit — 5 restarts from scratch, zero edits, ~250KB burned each. When a delegated agent won't converge like this, stop it (`TaskStop`) and apply the precisely-specified fixes **inline** on the main loop (opus) — the main loop doesn't restart from scratch. Verify no partial edits leaked first (scan the transcripts for Edit/Write tool_use). Related: [[cookiesync-cdp-bridge-shipped]], [[holistic-fixes-over-bandaids]].
